zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Patrick de Graham於1235年出生在英國蘇格蘭時，他的父親Sir David Graham - Laird Of Dundaff11232歲，母親Annabelle Sinclair23歲。他於大約1260年與Lady. William II在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他在蘇格蘭斯林史爾被列為high-sheriff。他去世於1296年4月27日在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴享年61歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴鄧巴。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Patrick de Graham于1235年出生在英国苏格兰时，他的父亲Sir David Graham - Laird Of Dundaff11232岁，母亲Annabelle Sinclair23岁。他于大约1260年与Lady. William II在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他在苏格兰斯林史爾被列为high-sheriff。他去世于1296年4月27日在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴享年61岁，埋葬在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴鄧巴。

nameMeanings.name: Graham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, recorded in Domesday Book as Graham (as well as Grantham, Grandham, and Granham). See also Grantham .

Irish (especially Ulster): in Ireland Graham is generally the Scottish name, but it has additionally been adopted as an Anglicized form of both Ó Creacháin (see Crehan ) and Ó Gormghaile (see Gormley ).

History: The surname Graham was taken to Scotland at the beginning of the 12th century by the Norman baron William de Graham, holder of the manor of Grantham in Lincolnshire, from whom many if not all modern bearers are probably descended. The chief of Clan Graham is the Duke of Montrose.

variants.name: Greim
meanings: South German: from a short form of a compound personal name beginning with the element grīm ‘mask, helmet’.

variants.name: Grahm
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire and northern England): shortened form of   Graham  .

variants.name: Grantham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and East Yorkshire): habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, of uncertain origin. The final element is Old English hām ‘homestead’; the first may be Old English grand ‘gravel’ or perhaps a personal name Granta, which probably originated as a byname meaning ‘snarler’. See also Graham .

variants.name: Grahame
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Graham  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 261, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

nameMeanings.name: Patrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name of the apostle and patron saint of Ireland ( c.389–461 ), Gaelic Pádraig. He was a Christian Briton and a Roman citizen, who as a young man was captured and enslaved by raiders from Ireland. He escaped and went to Gaul before returning home to Britain. In about 419 he felt a call to do missionary work in Ireland. He studied for twelve years at Auxerre, and in 432 returned to Ireland. For the rest of his life it is difficult to distinguish fact from fiction. He apparently went to the court of the high kings at Tara and made some converts there; then he travelled around Ireland making further converts until about 445 , when he established his archiepiscopal see at Armagh. By the time of his death almost the whole of Ireland is said to have been converted to Christianity. He is also credited with codifying the laws of Ireland. In his Latin autobiography, as well as in later tradition, his name appears as Patricius ‘patrician’ (i.e. belonging to the Roman senatorial or noble class), but this may actually represent a Latinized form of some lost Celtic (British) name. In Ireland in particular, it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Patrick de Graham was born in 1235, in Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir David Graham - Laird Of Dundaff, was 11232 and his mother, Annabelle Sinclair, was 23. He married Lady. William II about 1260, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. His occupation is listed as high-sheriff in Stirlingshire, Scotland. He died on 27 April 1296, in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 61, and was buried in Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

fr.Humbie, East Lothian, Scotland: Humbie and Fala, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Patrick de Graham est né en 1235, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir David Graham - Laird Of Dundaff, avait 11232 ans et sa mère, Annabelle Sinclair, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Lady. William II environ 1260, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Sa profession de son indiquée est high-sheriff à Stirlingshire, Écosse. Il est décédé le 27 avril 1296, à Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Patrick de Graham 1235 in Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir David Graham - Laird Of Dundaff 11232 und seine Mutter Annabelle Sinclair 23. Er hat um 1260 in Schottland, United Kingdom Lady. William II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als high-sheriff in Stirlingshire, Scotland aufgeführt. Er starb am 27. April 1296 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland und wurde in Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Patrick de Graham è nato il nel 1235 nel Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir David Graham - Laird Of Dundaff, aveva 11232 anni e il suo madre, Annabelle Sinclair, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Lady. William II circa 1260, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come high-sheriff nel Stirlingshire, Scotland. Morì il 27 aprile 1296, nel Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Patrick de Grahamが1235年にイギリススコットランドで生まれた時，父Sir David Graham - Laird Of Dundaffは11232歳，母Annabelle Sinclairは23歳であった。約1260年にイギリススコットランドでLady. William IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。スコットランドスティルリングシュアイアでの職業はhigh-sheriffと記録されている。彼は1296年4月27日にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーで61歳で死去し，スコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーダンバーにて埋葬された。

ko.Humbie, East Lothian, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 하딩토실르 훔비 앤드 팔라
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Patrick de Graham(이)가 1235년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir David Graham - Laird Of Dundaff(은)는 11232세였고, 그의 어머니 Annabelle Sinclair(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1260년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Lady. William II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 스컷랜드 스티를링실르에서 high-sheriff이었다. 그는 1296년 4월 27일 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바 던바에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Patrick de Graham nasceu em 1235, em Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir David Graham - Laird Of Dundaff, tinha 11232 anos e sua mãe, Annabelle Sinclair, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady. William II aproximadamente 1260, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como high-sheriff em Stirlingshire, Scotland. Ele faleceu em 27 de abril de 1296, em Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ru.Humbie, East Lothian, Scotland: хумби анд фала, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Patrick de Graham родился в 1235 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir David Graham - Laird Of Dundaff было 11232 года, а матери, которую звали Annabelle Sinclair, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady. William II около 1260 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь.  Он работал по профессии high-sheriff в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия. Он умер 27 апреля 1296 г. в местности дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности дунбар, дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия.

Se casó con Lady. William II aproximadamente 1260, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Su ocupación registrada era high-sheriff en Stirlingshire, Scotland.
